overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a neon-lit ramen bar, transitioning to a rain-slicked urban plaza surrounded by towering holographic advertisements, and finally entering a graffiti-covered corridor bathed in intense red neon light. The scene showcases a dense cyberpunk cityscape at night with reflective wet surfaces and vibrant artificial lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a narrow cyberpunk ramen bar illuminated by vibrant pink neon signage. The camera moves forward past wooden dining tables toward a service counter where a female bartender stands. Industrial ceiling fans rotate overhead, and an illuminated menu screen hangs above the counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway transition to plaza

events.description: exits the ramen bar through a doorway into a covered walkway leading toward the open plaza

agents.ego_description: leaving the enclosed bar and moving through a transitional covered walkway

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure with fluorescent lighting panels
illuminated beverage vending machine with red and white coloring
tall digital advertisement screen displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the ramen bar into a covered pedestrian walkway. The enclosed feeling of the bar gives way to a semi-open transitional space with a vending machine visible on the right and the bright lights of the city plaza visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic skyscraper advertisements

events.description: emerges from covered walkway into expansive open plaza surrounded by towering buildings with holographic ads

agents.ego_description: walking across the rain-slicked plaza, navigating between parked vehicles and neon signage

entered.detail: rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall glass tower covered in massive holographic advertisements and animated billboards
building-sized digital screen displaying a woman's face advertisement
several parked scooters and motorcycles along the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast urban plaza with wet pavement reflecting the vibrant neon lights of surrounding skyscrapers. Towering holographic advertisements cover the glass buildings, while parked motorcycles line the left side. The camera moves through this open cyberpunk cityscape toward a red-lit corridor entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered pedestrian corridor with red neon lighting

events.description: enters narrow corridor illuminated by intense red neon strips and lined with graffiti-covered walls
approaches a group of figures gathered near a burning barrel fire

agents.ego_description: entering the red-lit corridor and approaching figures near a barrel fire

notable_agents.action: figure sitting on the ground near the burning barrel fire

entered.detail: intense red neon strip lights running along the ceiling of the corridor
walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art
metal barrel with open fire providing warmth and light
row of illuminated arcade game cabinets along the right wall
circular red structure in the center of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow corridor bathed in intense red neon light, with walls covered in graffiti. A burning barrel fire illuminates figures sitting nearby, while arcade machines line the right wall. The enclosed space creates an intimate, gritty atmosphere distinct from the open plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate glow of a neon ramen bar into a sprawling urban plaza before descending into a gritty, red-lit alleyway. It begins inside the narrow eatery, moving past wooden tables and rotating ceiling fans toward a female bartender and an illuminated menu. As the camera exits the bar, the enclosed space gives way to a semi-open pedestrian walkway featuring a vending machine that leads toward the bright city lights. The scene then expands into a vast, rain-slicked plaza where towering holographic advertisements reflect off wet pavement and parked motorcycles line the path. Finally, the camera leaves the open cityscape to enter a narrow, graffiti-covered corridor bathed in intense red neon, passing arcade machines and a burning barrel fire.
